title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with large language models locally. CLI and REST API for pulling, running, and managing GGUF models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Async/sync chat, generate, embed, pull, list, and delete models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers. Promise-based API identical to Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM and embeddings wrappers.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama with multi-model conversations, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and async support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for Ollama. Chat, generate, pull, and manage models from Ruby.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Experimental interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models written in Node.js.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Tiny shell library wrapping curl for quick Ollama REST calls from bash scripts.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store in a single Python notebook.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama for DM and channel chat with thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module exposing Ollama as a CI step for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate with async client for Ollama using reqwest and tokio.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET community SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-based connection pooling.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client using std.http to talk to Ollama REST API.
